300 - Account Management.name: ProjectStatus

300 - Account Management.formula: const SetValue = async (context) => { const projectStage = context?.Form?.Page1?.ProjectStage?.Value || ""; // Get assessment status for special handling const assessmentStatus = context?.Form?.Page1?.AssessmentStatus?.Value || ""; // Check if assessment status indicates cancellation const canceledStatuses = [ "Installation requires excessive remediation", "Customer Refused to Participate", "Customer does not meet minimum savings requirement" ]; if (projectStage == "Assessment" && canceledStatuses.includes(assessmentStatus)) { return "Canceled"; } // Map project stages to their corresponding status fields const stageToStatusMap = { "Lead": context?.Form?.Page1?.LeadStatuses?.Value || "", "Enrollment": context?.Form?.Page1?.EnrollmentStatus?.Value || "", "Assessment": assessmentStatus, "Installation": context?.Form?.Page1?.InstallationStatus?.Value || "", "Completed": "" }; // Return the status based on the current project stage return stageToStatusMap[projectStage] || ""; };

300 - Account Management.name: EstimatedCloseoutDate
300 - Account Management.label: Estimated Project Closeout Date
300 - Account Management.formula: const SetValue = async (context) => { const assignedDate = context?.Form?.Page1?.LeadAssignedDate?.Value || ""; const projectStage = context?.Form?.Page1?.ProjectStage?.Value || ""; const installationCompletedDate = context?.Form?.Page1?.InstallationCompletedDate?.Value || ""; // Return N/A if no assigned date if (!assignedDate) { return "N/A"; } // Calculate estimated date (+60 days) const estimatedDate = new Date(assignedDate); estimatedDate.setDate(estimatedDate.getDate() + 60); const formattedEstDate = `${estimatedDate.getMonth() + 1}/${estimatedDate.getDate()}/${estimatedDate.getFullYear()}`; // Add difference if project is completed if (projectStage === "Completed" && installationCompletedDate) { const completedDate = new Date(installationCompletedDate); const diffDays = Math.round((completedDate - estimatedDate) / (1000 * 60 * 60 * 24)); return `${formattedEstDate} (${diffDays > 0 ? "+" : ""}${diffDays} days)`; } return formattedEstDate; };

300 - Account Management.name: EstimatedCloseoutTime
300 - Account Management.label: Project Closeout Time
300 - Account Management.formula: const SetValue = async (context) => { // Extract values const assignedDate = context?.Form?.Page1?.LeadAssignedDate?.Value || ""; const projectStage = context?.Form?.Page1?.ProjectStage?.Value || ""; const leadStatus = context?.Form?.Page1?.LeadStatuses?.Value || ""; // Return early if conditions aren't met if (projectStage === "Lead" || leadStatus !== "Completed Lead" || !assignedDate || projectStage === "Completed") { return "N/A"; } // Calculate target date (60 days after assigned date) const targetDate = new Date(assignedDate); targetDate.setDate(targetDate.getDate() + 60); // Calculate days remaining const currentDate = new Date(); const daysLeft = Math.ceil((targetDate - currentDate) / (1000 * 60 * 60 * 24)); return `${daysLeft} day(s)`; };

300 - Account Management.name: SiteId
300 - Account Management.label: Site ID
300 - Account Management.formula: const SetValue = async (context) => { // Extract address components with safety checks const street = context.Form.Page1.SiteAddressStreet1.Value || ""; const city = context.Form.Page1.SiteAddressCity.Value || ""; let zipCode = context.Form.Page1.SiteAddressZipcode.Value || ""; // Define a map for common directional prefixes and street suffixes to their standardized forms const directionMap = { 'N': 'N', 'S': 'S', 'E': 'E', 'W': 'W', 'NE': 'NE', 'NW': 'NW', 'SE': 'SE', 'SW': 'SW', 'NORTH': 'N', 'SOUTH': 'S', 'EAST': 'E', 'WEST': 'W', 'NORTHEAST': 'NE', 'NORTHWEST': 'NW', 'SOUTHEAST': 'SE', 'SOUTHWEST': 'SW' }; const suffixMap = { 'ST': 'ST', 'STREET': 'ST', 'RD': 'RD', 'ROAD': 'RD', 'AVE': 'AVE', 'AVENUE': 'AVE', 'BLVD': 'BLVD', 'BOULEVARD': 'BLVD', 'DR': 'DR', 'DRIVE': 'DR', 'CT': 'CT', 'COURT': 'CT', 'CIR': 'CIR', 'CIRCLE': 'CIR', 'LN': 'LN', 'LANE': 'LN' // Add more suffixes as needed }; // Standardize and clean the street address let cleanStreet = street .replace(/\b(N|S|E|W|NE|NW|SE|SW|NORTH|SOUTH|EAST|WEST|NORTHEAST|NORTHWEST|SOUTHEAST|SOUTHWEST)\b/gi, match => directionMap[match.toUpperCase()] || '') .replace(/\b(ST|STREET|RD|ROAD|AVE|AVENUE|BLVD|BOULEVARD|DR|DRIVE|CT|COURT|LN|LANE)\b/gi, match => suffixMap[match.toUpperCase()] || match) .replace(/[\s.,]+/g, '') // Remove spaces, periods, commas .toUpperCase(); // Clean the city and zip code const cleanCity = city.replace(/[\s.,]+/g, '').toUpperCase(); let cleanZipCode = zipCode.replace(/[\s.,]+/g, '').toUpperCase(); // Combine the cleaned components into the SiteID const siteID = `${cleanStreet}${cleanCity}${cleanZipCode}`; // Return the computed SiteID return siteID.trim(); }

300 - Account Management.name: StageChangeDate
300 - Account Management.label: Stage Change Date
300 - Account Management.formula: const SetValue = async (context) => { // Helper to format date as MM/DD/YYYY const formatDate = (dateValue) => { if (!dateValue) return ""; const date = new Date(dateValue); const month = (date.getMonth() + 1).toString().padStart(2, '0'); const day = date.getDate().toString().padStart(2, '0'); const year = date.getFullYear(); return `${month}/${day}/${year}`; }; const projectStage = context?.Form?.Page1?.ProjectStage?.Value || ""; const projectStatus = context?.Form?.Page1?.ProjectStatus?.Value || ""; const projectReason = context?.Form?.Page1?.ComputedReason?.Value || ""; // Handle canceled projects first if (projectReason !== "") { return formatDate(context?.Form?.Page1?.CanceledDate?.Value); } // Direct field access based on stage let dateValue = ""; if (projectStage == "Lead") { dateValue = context?.Form?.Page1?.LeadAssignedDate?.Value || ""; } else if (projectStage == "Enrollment") { dateValue = context?.Form?.Page1?.LeadCompletedDate?.Value || ""; } else if (projectStage == "Assessment") { dateValue = context?.Form?.Page1?.EnrollmentDate?.Value || ""; } else if (projectStage == "Installation") { if (projectStatus == "Installed") { dateValue = context?.Form?.Page1?.InstallationCompletedDate?.Value || ""; } else { dateValue = context?.Form?.Page1?.AssessmentDate?.Value || ""; } } else if (projectStage == "Completed") { dateValue = context?.Form?.Page1?.JobCompletedDate?.Value || ""; } return formatDate(dateValue) || formatDate(context?.Form?.Page1?.LastModifiedAt?.Value); };

300 - Account Management.name: ComputedReason
300 - Account Management.label: Reason
300 - Account Management.formula: const SetValue = async (context) => { // Define the list of reason fields to check in priority order const invoiceEnrollment = !!context?.Form?.ContractorInformationPage?.InvoiceEnrollment?.Value; const invoiceDp = !!context?.Form?.ContractorInformationPage?.RequestDP?.Value; const invoiceFinal = !!context?.Form?.ContractorInformationPage?.InvoiceInstallation?.Value; const reset = !!context?.Form?.Page1?.ResetProjectStatus?.Value; if (reset) {return ""}; // Check for minimum savings requirement condition if (context?.Form?.Page1?.AssessmentStatus?.Value === "Customer does not meet minimum savings requirement") { return "Customer does not meet minimum savings requirement - Referred to ESA Core Program"; } const reasonFields = [ context?.Form?.Page1?.CancellationReason?.Value, context?.Form?.Page1?.DeclinedReason?.Value, context?.Form?.Page1?.IneligibleReason?.Value, context?.Form?.Page1?.AssessmentCancellationReason?.Value, context?.Form?.Page1?.InstalationCancellationReason?.Value ]; // Find the first non-empty reason const firstValidReason = reasonFields.find(reason => reason && reason !== ""); // Return the first valid reason or empty string if none found return firstValidReason || ""; }

300 - Account Management.name: EnrollmentStatus
300 - Account Management.label: Enrollment Status
300 - Account Management.formula: const SetValue = async (context) => { const projectStage = context?.Form?.Page1?.ProjectStage?.Value || ""; const assessmentStatus = context?.Form?.Page1?.AssessmentStatus?.Value || ""; // Check if assessmentStatus is "Approved for Install" if (assessmentStatus == "Approved for Install") { return "Enrolled"; } // List of statuses that result in "De-enrolled" const deEnrolledStatuses = [ "Customer does not meet minimum savings requirement", "Customer Refused to Participate", "Installation requires excessive remediation" ]; // Return "De-enrolled" if the status matches any in the list if (deEnrolledStatuses.includes(assessmentStatus)) { return "De-enrolled"; } const enrollmentStatus = context?.Form?.ApplicantInformationPage?.Value || ""; if (enrollmentStatus == "Enrollment Approved") { return "Enrolled"; } // Return "Enrolled" if the stage is "Assessment" and the status is not "Canceled" if (projectStage == "Assessment" && assessmentStatus !== "Canceled") { return "Enrolled"; } const leadStatus = context?.Form?.Page1?.LeadStatuses?.Value || ""; // Return empty string if the stage is "Lead" if (projectStage == "Lead" && leadStatus !== "Completed Lead") { return ""; } // Default return value return ""; };

300 - Account Management.name: SubtotalCost

300 - Account Management.formula: const SetValue = async (context) => { // Safely extract values, defaulting to 0 const costOverride = parseFloat(context?.Form?.MeasureCostOverride?.Value) || 0; const measureCost = parseFloat(context?.Form?.MeasureCost?.Value) || 0; const measureQty = parseFloat(context?.Form?.MeasureQty?.Value) || 0; const ignoreCalc = !!context?.Form?.EnterSnuggProValue?.Value; // If ignoreCalc is true, return costOverride directly if (ignoreCalc || costOverride !== 0) { return costOverride; } // Use costOverride if it's greater than 0; otherwise, use measureCost const actualCost = costOverride > 0 ? costOverride : measureCost; // Calculate result const result = actualCost * measureQty; // Return the result, rounded to 2 decimal places return result; };

300 - Account Management.name: SubtotalkWh

// Convert to Date objects and find the most recent const dateObjects = validDates.map(d => new Date(d)); const mostRecent = new Date(Math.max(...dateObjects)); return formatDate(mostRecent); }; if (inspectionType === "Post-Inspection") { // Return most recent date from inspection dates return getMostRecentDate([ scheduledDate, completedDate, refusedDate, rescheduledDate, readyForReview, failedDate, cgiDate ]); } else if (inspectionType === "Re-Inspection") { // Return most recent date from re-inspection dates return getMostRecentDate([ scheduledDate2, completedDate2, refusedDate2, rescheduledDate2, readyForReview2, failedDate2, cgiDate2 ]); 395 - Inspection Work Order.formula: const SetValue = async (context) => { const createdDate = context?.Form?.InspectionPage?.WorkOrderCreatedDate?.Value || ""; if (!createdDate) return "N/A"; // Inspection dates const completionDate = context?.Form?.InspectionPage?.InspectionCompletedDate?.Value || ""; const failedDate = context?.Form?.InspectionPage?.FailedDate?.Value || ""; const refusedDate = context?.Form?.InspectionPage?.InspectionRefusedDate?.Value || ""; const cgiDate = context?.Form?.InspectionPage?.CGIDate?.Value || ""; // Reinspection dates const reCompletionDate = context?.Form?.InspectionPage?.ReInspectionCompletedDate?.Value || ""; const reFailedDate = context?.Form?.InspectionPage?.ReInspectionFailedDate?.Value || ""; const reRefusedDate = context?.Form?.InspectionPage?.ReInspectionRefusedDate?.Value || ""; const reCgiDate = context?.Form?.InspectionPage?.ReInspectionCGIDate?.Value || ""; const created = new Date(createdDate); // Collect all terminal dates (inspection + reinspection) const terminalDates = [ completionDate, failedDate, refusedDate, cgiDate, reCompletionDate, reFailedDate, reRefusedDate, reCgiDate ].filter(d => d); // Use the latest terminal date if any exist, otherwise use today const endDate = terminalDates.length > 0 ? new Date(Math.max(...terminalDates.map(d => new Date(d)))) : new Date(); const diffTime = Math.abs(endDate - created); const diffDays = Math.ceil(diffTime / (1000 * 60 * 60 * 24)); return diffDays.toString(); }

Invoice.label: 30 Day Payment Counter (Enrollment)
Invoice.formula: const SetValue = async (context) => { const receivedDate = context?.Form?.InvoicePage?.EnrollmentInvoiceDate?.Value || ""; // Return N/A if no date if (!receivedDate) { return "N/A"; } // Calculate estimated date (+30 days from received date) const estimatedDate = new Date(receivedDate); estimatedDate.setDate(estimatedDate.getDate() + 30); // Format with leading zeros for month and day if needed const month = String(estimatedDate.getMonth() + 1).padStart(2, '0'); const day = String(estimatedDate.getDate()).padStart(2, '0'); const year = estimatedDate.getFullYear(); return `${month}/${day}/${year}`; };

Invoice.name: EnrollmentApproverManagement
Invoice.label: Management Review Status (Enrollment)
Invoice.formula: const SetValue = async (context) => { // Get the invoice details grid const grid = context?.Form?.InvoicePage?.EnrollmentInvoiceDetails || []; const authorizedApprovers = ["Mauricio Blanco", "Roberto Del Real"]; // Filter to get only rows with authorized approvers const approverRows = grid.filter(row => authorizedApprovers.includes(row?.EnrollmentReviewer?.Text) ); // If there are any matching rows, return the most recent status if (approverRows.length > 0) { // Get the first row (most recent) since grid is sorted newest first const mostRecentRow = approverRows[0]; return mostRecentRow?.EnrollmentStatus?.Value || ""; } // Return empty string if no matching rows found return ""; };

Invoice.name: EnrollmentApproverPM
Invoice.label: PM Review Status (Enrollment)
Invoice.formula: const SetValue = async (context) => { // Get the invoice details grid const grid = context?.Form?.InvoicePage?.EnrollmentInvoiceDetails || []; const pm = "Dan Accardo"; // Filter to get only rows with the pm const pmRows = grid.filter(row => row?.EnrollmentReviewer?.Text === pm); // If pm has any rows, return the most recent status if (pmRows.length > 0) { // Get the first row (most recent) since grid is sorted newest first const mostRecentRow = pmRows[0]; return mostRecentRow?.EnrollmentStatus?.Value || ""; } // Return empty string if no pm rows found return ""; };

Invoice.name: EnrollmentApproverCoordinator
Invoice.label: Coordinator Review Status (Enrollment)
Invoice.formula: const SetValue = async (context) => { // Get the invoice details grid const grid = context?.Form?.InvoicePage?.EnrollmentInvoiceDetails || []; const coordinator = ["Chuk Mmegwa","Luis Cervantes"]; // Filter to get only rows with the coordinator const coordinatorRows = grid.filter(row => row?.EnrollmentReviewer?.Text === coordinator); // If coordinator has any rows, return the most recent status if (coordinatorRows.length > 0) { // Get the last (most recent) row for the coordinator const mostRecentRow = coordinatorRows[coordinatorRows.length - 1]; return mostRecentRow?.EnrollmentStatus?.Value || ""; } // Return empty string if no coordinator rows found return ""; };

Invoice.name: DPThirtyDayPaymentCounter
Invoice.label: 30 Day Payment Counter (DP)
Invoice.formula: const SetValue = async (context) => { const receivedDate = context?.Form?.InvoicePage?.DPInvoiceDate?.Value || ""; // Return N/A if no date if (!receivedDate) { return "N/A"; } // Calculate estimated date (+30 days from received date) const estimatedDate = new Date(receivedDate); estimatedDate.setDate(estimatedDate.getDate() + 30); // Format with leading zeros for month and day if needed const month = String(estimatedDate.getMonth() + 1).padStart(2, '0'); const day = String(estimatedDate.getDate()).padStart(2, '0'); const year = estimatedDate.getFullYear(); return `${month}/${day}/${year}`; };

Invoice.name: DPApprovedStatusDate
Invoice.label: Invoice Approved Date (DP)
Invoice.formula: const SetValue = async (context) => { const formatDate = (val) => { if (!val) return "N/A"; const date = new Date(val); return `${date.getMonth() + 1}/${date.getDate()}/${date.getFullYear()}`; }; const trackerDate = context?.Form?.InvoicePage?.H_ApprovedDate_DP?.Value || ""; if (trackerDate != "") return formatDate(trackerDate); const authorizedApprovers = ["Dan Accardo", "Mauricio Blanco", "Roberto Del Real", "Natalie Velores", "Jose Landeros"]; const invoiceTable = context?.Form?.InvoicePage?.DPInvoiceDetails || []; for (let i = invoiceTable.length - 1; i >= 0; i--) { const invoice = invoiceTable[i]; if (invoice?.DownpaymentStatus?.Value == "Approved" && authorizedApprovers.includes(invoice?.DPReviewer?.Text)) { return formatDate(invoice?.DPStatusDateChange?.Value); } } return "N/A"; };

Invoice.name: DownPaymentStatusSummary
Invoice.label: Invoice Status (DP)
Invoice.formula: const SetValue = async (context) => { // If no Down Payment request - return N/A const requestDp = !context?.Form?.InvoicePage?.DownPaymentRequest?.Value; if (requestDp) { return "N/A"; } // Check issue date first - fastest early return const issueDate = context?.Form?.InvoicePage?.DPIssueDate?.Value; if (issueDate) return "Payment Issued"; // Get PM approval status const dpApproverPM = context?.Form?.InvoicePage?.DPApproverPM?.Value; if (dpApproverPM === "Approved") return "Approved for Down Payment"; if (dpApproverPM) return dpApproverPM; // Check coordinator approval status if (context?.Form?.InvoicePage?.DPApproverCoordinator?.Value === "Approved") { return "Pending Review by PM"; } // Return most recent status from grid return context?.Form?.InvoicePage?.DPInvoiceDetails?.[0]?.DownpaymentStatus?.Text || "Pending Review"; };

Invoice.name: DPReasonSummary
Invoice.label: Invoice Status Note (DP)
Invoice.formula: const SetValue = async (context) => { return context?.Form?.InvoicePage?.DPInvoiceDetails?.[0]?.DPInvoiceNote?.Text || ""; };

Invoice.name: DPReviewerRole
Invoice.label: Reviewer Role (DP)
Invoice.formula: const SetValue = async (context) => { // Get the employee title with a small "trick" to force reactivity const employeeTitle = (context?.Form?.DPReviewer?.EmployeeTitle + "") || ""; // Return the title return employeeTitle; }

Invoice.name: DPCurrentAssignee
Invoice.label: Assigned User (DP)
Invoice.formula: const SetValue = async (context) => { if (!context?.Form?.InvoicePage?.DownPaymentRequest?.Value) { return ""; } if (context?.Form?.InvoicePage?.DPApproverPM?.Value == "Approved" && context?.Form?.InvoicePage?.DPIssueDate?.Value == "") { return "Julie Blanco"; } if (context?.Form?.InvoicePage?.DPIssueDate?.Value !== "") { return "N/A"; } const grid = context?.Form?.InvoicePage?.DPInvoiceDetails || []; if (grid.length == 0) { return "Coordinator"; } const mostRecentAction = grid[0]; const recentApprover = mostRecentAction?.DPReviewer?.Text || ""; const recentStatus = mostRecentAction?.DownpaymentStatus?.Text || ""; const stayStatuses = ["Received", "In Review", "Submitted to IOUs"]; const coordinatorLastNames = ["Cervantes", "Jancik", "Enotiades", "Chavez", "Quintanilla", "Mendez", "Avila"]; const isCoordinator = coordinatorLastNames.some(name => recentApprover.includes(name)); const pmLastNames = ["Accardo", "Velores", "Landeros"]; const isPM = pmLastNames.some(name => recentApprover.includes(name)); // Pending Corrections - always goes to contractor if (recentStatus == "Pending Corrections") { return context?.Form?.InvoicePage?.DPInstallationContractor?.Text || "Coordinator"; } // Corrections Submitted - return to previous actor if (recentStatus == "Corrections Submitted") { return grid[1]?.DPReviewer?.Text || "Coordinator"; } // Rejected - drop down one tier if (recentStatus == "Rejected") { if (isPM) return "Coordinator"; if (isCoordinator) return context?.Form?.InvoicePage?.DPInstallationContractor?.Text || "Coordinator"; return "Coordinator"; } // PM routing - approved goes straight to Julie if (isPM) { if (stayStatuses.includes(recentStatus)) return recentApprover; if (recentStatus == "Approved") return "Julie Blanco"; } // Coordinator routing - approved escalates to PM if (isCoordinator) { if (stayStatuses.includes(recentStatus)) return recentApprover; if (recentStatus == "Approved") return "Program Manager"; } // Contractor stay status - return to last internal reviewer if (stayStatuses.includes(recentStatus)) { return grid[0]?.DPReviewer?.Text || "Coordinator"; } return "Coordinator"; };

Invoice.name: DPApproverCoordinator
Invoice.label: Coordinator Review Status (DP)
Invoice.formula: const SetValue = async (context) => { // Get the invoice details grid const grid = context?.Form?.InvoicePage?.DPInvoiceDetails || []; const coordinators = ["Chuk Mmegwa", "Luis Cervantes"]; // Filter to get only rows where DPReviewer is one of the coordinators const coordinatorRows = grid.filter(row => coordinators.includes(row?.DPReviewer?.Text)); // If coordinator has any rows, return the most recent status if (coordinatorRows.length > 0) { // Get the first row (most recent) for the coordinator const mostRecentRow = coordinatorRows[0]; return mostRecentRow?.DownpaymentStatus?.Value || ""; } // Return empty string if no coordinator rows found return ""; };

Invoice.name: DPApproverPM
Invoice.label: PM Review Status (DP)
Invoice.formula: const SetValue = async (context) => { // Get the invoice details grid const grid = context?.Form?.InvoicePage?.DPInvoiceDetails || []; const coordinator = "Dan Accardo"; // Filter to get only rows with the coordinator const coordinatorRows = grid.filter(row => row?.DPReviewer?.Text === coordinator); // If coordinator has any rows, return the most recent status if (coordinatorRows.length > 0) { // Get the first row (most recent) for the coordinator // Since original grid is sorted newest first, filtered array maintains that order const mostRecentRow = coordinatorRows[0]; return mostRecentRow?.DownpaymentStatus?.Value || ""; } // Return empty string if no coordinator rows found return ""; };

Invoice.formula: const SetValue = async (context) => { const string = context?.Form?.InvoicePage?.EsaKey?.Value || ""; const link = "https://mes.greenteamhub.com/Forms/Responses/v2/"; const updateSuffix = "/Update" if (string !== "") { return `${link}${string}${updateSuffix}`; } }
